chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-20 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on MA No.67/2025. 2. For order on office objection. 3. For order on MA No.68/2025. 4. For hearing of main case. 18.02.2025 Mr. Ghulam Rasool advocate appearing on behalf of the petitioner. 1. Urgency granted. 2to4. Through this petition, the petitioner is seeking his appointment against Deceased Quota in terms of Rule 11-A of Sindh Civil Servants (Appointment, Promotion and Transfer) Rules, 1974. However, the appointment against Deceased Quota, inter alia, has been declared as ultra vires by the Honourable Supreme Court in its authoritative pronouncement handed down in the case of General Post Office, Islamabad & others v. Muhammad Jalal (Civil Petition No.3390 of 2021). In view of the above, instant petition is dismissed in limini along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
